name: TDD-STATE-MACHINE-BUG-6
title: Post-wave cleanup: check_sentinel silent-swallow (Inv 7 violation); sys.path leak; duplicated spec-update→test-red branch
description:
Audit findings after BACKLOG-5:

1. _run_enforcement_checks passes warn_msg='' for check_sentinel (tdd-step.py:224), so a failed sentinel check is silently swallowed (empty warn_msg short-circuits _emit). Spec Inv 7 says 'A failed CheckResult emits a warning via rabbit_print on stderr but does not fail the transition' — this exception isn't documented. Either supply a real warning message like 'WARNING: sentinel check failed for {d}' or document the exception in the spec.

2. _load_checks_module inserts features_dir into sys.path (tdd-step.py:188) and never removes it. Harmless in short-lived process, but pollutes sys.path for any future in-process embedding. Add finally cleanup or use a context manager.

3. spec-update→test-red branch is duplicated for the normal-forward and --force paths (tdd-step.py:388-389 and 397-398). Hoist into single post-write hook block to avoid drift between the two copies.

4. contract.md reads.files declares <feature-dir>/docs/spec/spec.md but check_numbered_lists walks the WHOLE docs/spec/ directory. Update reads to declare the directory or include contract.md.
